landing.heroTitle: Compassionate Care for Your Loved Ones
landing.heroSubtitle: Professional home health and hospice services dedicated to providing quality care with dignity and respect.
landing.philosophyText: We believe in treating our patients with dignity, respect, and empathy. We strive to make their end-of-life journey as comfortable and meaningful as possible.
landing.caringSinceText: Providing compassionate care in the comfort of your home since 2021.
landing.aboutText: Compassionate Home Health & Hospice is a family-owned and operated business founded by Jane Smith, RN. With over 15 years of experience in healthcare, Jane started this company to provide personalized, compassionate care to patients in their homes. Our team of dedicated professionals is committed to enhancing the quality of life for our patients and their families through comprehensive home health and hospice services.

homeHealth.title: Home Health
homeHealth.subtitle: Professional healthcare services delivered in the comfort and safety of your home, promoting independence and quality of life.

services.doctorsDesc: Our MDs develop and review care plans, manage symptoms, and act as a medical resource.
services.ptDesc: Help patients maintain mobility, manage pain, and improve quality of life.
services.otDesc: Assist patients in maintaining independence in daily activities.
services.nursesDesc: Collaborate with physicians and provide medical care at home.
services.stDesc: Help patients improve communication, swallowing, and cognitive function.
services.chhaDesc: Assist with daily activities like bathing, dressing, and meal prep.
services.mswDesc: Provide emotional support and connect patients with community resources.
services.multilingualDesc: Services available in multiple languages to support diverse patient needs.

locations.title: Our Location
locations.address1: 1501 N Broadway, Ste 350A/B, Walnut Creek, CA 94596

portal.title: Customer Portal
portal.welcomeSubtitle: Manage your appointments and health care information
portal.scheduleCardDesc: Book a new home health or hospice appointment

schedule.title: Schedule an Appointment
schedule.subtitle: Please provide your details and preferred appointment time.
schedule.successMsg: Appointment request submitted! We will confirm your visit shortly.

footer.tagline: Providing compassionate care in the comfort of your home since 2010.
footer.copyright: Compassionate Home Health & Hospice. All rights reserved.
